name: claude-card
description: Glanceable e-ink 副屏 for Claude Code workflows. Server-side-rendered 540×960 frames pushed to an M5Paper V1.1 over Wi-Fi / USB / BLE. 16 widget types (weather / todo / calendar / inbox / pr-queue / ai-status / focus / scratch / next-meeting / break-reminder / deadlines / messages / now-playing / git-status / system / ai-tasks). Slash commands: /card-onboard, /card-widget, /card-wifi-setup, /card-refresh, /card-sleep, /card-start, /card-stop, /card-status, /card-install. Companion to (but independent from) the m5-paper-buddy plugin.
author: op7418
